Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add subsystem folder structure \(Melhoria 01\)

- Add `subsystem` field to PipelineConfig \(default: "sihsus"\)
- Add PipelineConfig.create\(\) factory method for automatic path configuration
- Creates standardized directory structure: base_dir/{subsystem}/dbc|dbf|parquet/
- Update basic_usage.py to use new factory method

This allows organizing data by DataSUS subsystem \(SIHSUS, SIM, SIASUS, etc\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
